/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_thread_safety_annotations.dir/test/test_thread_safety_annotations.cpp.o -o test_thread_safety_annotations  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/rcpputils:/opt/ros/humble/lib gtest/libgtest_main.a gtest/libgtest.a librcpputils.so -pthread /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
